details.description:
Beautiful studio / 1 bath apartment in Williamsburg, prime location! This apartment features a spacious living room, queen-sized bedroom, stainless steel kitchen, modern bathroom, hardwood floors, and windows that let in natural light throughout. You?ll be right around the corner from dozens of top-rated bars, restaurants, cafes, grocers, and music/art venues. Local favorites include Westlight, Brooklyn Bowl, Extra Fancy, Lucky Dog, Baby?s All Right, Patrizia?s, Battery Harris, Post Office, and Freehold. Short commute to Manhattan; easy access to the rest of Brooklyn?s hottest neighborhoods. Only blocks from the L train, and a short walk to the JMZ trains
Aug 1st move in Small pets welcome

amenities.other: Hardwood Floors

details.description:
Myspace Exclusive!
One bedroom with separate living room and kitchen in 1920s elevator prewar with live-in super.
- Queen sized bedroom - Big living room space - Tons of light, exposed brick, updated modern bathroom, kingsize bedrooms; plenty of space for entertaining.
Fabulous location just steps from Montrose L / Flushing JMZ trains and surrounded by tons of great bars, restaurants; shopping. Short commute to Manhattan!
Aug 1 move in Heat; hot water included Small pets welcome

amenities.other: Hardwood Floors, Stainless steel appliances

details.description:
Myspace Exclusive! Beautiful apartment in Williamsburg, prime location!
This 2 bedroom apartment features a spacious living room, queen-sized bedrooms, stainless steel kitchen, modern bathroom, hardwood floors, and windows that let in natural light throughout.
You?ll be right around the corner from dozens of top-rated bars, restaurants, cafes, grocers, and music/art venues. Local favorites include Westlight, Brooklyn Bowl, Extra Fancy, Lucky Dog, Baby?s All Right, Patrizia?s, Battery Harris, Post Office, and Freehold.
Short commute to Manhattan; easy access to the rest of Brooklyn?s hottest neighborhoods. Only # blocks from the L train, and a # minute walk to the JMZ trains
July 1 move in Small pets welcome No broker fee

amenities.other: Hardwood Floors

details.description:
Welcome to The Elliot, a contemporary residential building designed for comfortable modern living. The building features stylish common areas, quality finishes, and a strong amenity package for residents to enjoy.
BUILDING AMENITIES ? Sauna ? Yoga studio ? Film studio ? Modern lobby and common areas ? Elevator ? Package room ? Laundry room ? Bike storage
UNIT FEATURES ? Modern finishes ? Updated kitchen ? Stainless steel appliances ? Hardwood flooring ? Ample closet space ? Large windows ? Plenty of natural light

amenities.other: Dishwasher, Washer/Dryer In Unit, Private Outdoor Space, Central A/C

details.description:
No Fee ? Luxury 1 Bed / 1 Bath in Brand New Elevator Building in Clinton Hill!
Modern design meets prime location in this spacious 1-bedroom, 1 bath apartment featuring hardwood floors, high ceilings, central A/C, and a private balcony. The open layout is perfect for entertaining, and each bedroom offers great light and flexibility.
Enjoy top-notch amenities including: ? Elevator ? Gym ? Lounge; Game Room ? Shared Workspace; Public Wifi ? Laundry Room; Bike Storage ? Furnished Rooftop with Skyline Views ? Courtyard; Outdoor Spaces ? Dishwasher, Eat-In Kitchen, Stainless Steel Appliances
Just 1 block from the Franklin Ave C/S trains?15 minutes to Manhattan. Close to Outpost, Doris, Sisters, and other local favorites.
First; Security Only | No Fee | Pets on Approval

amenities.other: A/C, Balcony/Terrace, Dishwasher, Hardwood Floors, Intercom system, Central A/C, Roof Access

details.description:
Studio in a modern elevator building with one of the biggest living rooms you?ll find?room for dining, lounging, and working. Bright and airy with oversized windows, a large kitchen, great storage, and in-unit washer/dryer. A/C in every room, big closets, sunny bedroom.
Building perks: gym, roof deck, pet spa, parking (for a fee), lounge, bike storage. No broker fee.

amenities.other: Dishwasher, Washer/Dryer In Unit, Central A/C

details.description:
The Baltic Canal ? Modern Living in Boerum Hill
Studios, 1-; 2-BR homes with oversized windows, white oak floors, custom kitchens, spa-style baths, and in-unit or on-site laundry. Select residences offer private balconies or terraces.
Amenities: Bike room, elevator, package room, gym, media room, and multiple outdoor spaces ? deck, garden, patio; panoramic roof deck.
Unbeatable location at the crossroads of Boerum Hill, Gowanus; Park Slope, near Whole Foods, top restaurants, boutique shops; F/G/R trains.
📅 Schedule your tour today and make The Baltic Canal your next home.

amenities.other: Dishwasher, Washer/Dryer In Unit, Central A/C

details.description:
Bright and modern 1-bedroom in a beautifully restored historic mansion on Bushwick Ave, just one block from the J/Z trains at Gates Ave. This thoughtfully renovated home features a spacious living area with great natural light, a uniquely shaped bedroom with oversized windows and a full closet, and sleek modern finishes throughout.
Features include:
High ceilings and hardwood floors
Central air and dishwasher
Great sunlight throughout
Building perks:
Laundry on-site
Bike storage
Parking available

amenities.other: Dishwasher

details.description: 2BR/1BTH Amenities: ? Dishwasher ? Exposed brick ? High ceilings ? Renovated kitchen ? Half bath ? Great light ? Pet friendly

amenities.other: Dishwasher

details.description:
Studio in a modern elevator building with one of the biggest living rooms you?ll find?room for dining, lounging, and working. Bright and airy with oversized windows, a large kitchen, great storage, and in-unit washer/dryer. A/C in every room, big closets, sunny bedroom.
Building perks: gym, roof deck, pet spa, parking (for a fee), lounge, bike storage. No broker fee.

amenities.other: Dishwasher, Washer/Dryer In Unit, Central A/C

details.description:
Virtual tours available!
Beautiful 2 bed / 1 bath apartment in Bushwick, prime location! This apartment features a spacious living room, queen-sized bedrooms, stainless steel kitchen, modern bathroom, hardwood floors, and windows that let in natural light throughout. You'll be right around the corner from dozens of top-rated bars, restaurants, cafes, grocers, and music/art venues. Local favorites include Mominette, Sea Wolf, Three Diamond Door, Precious Metal, The Rookery, Archie's, Heavy Woods, Idlewild, Clara's, Yours Sincerely, Chuko, Los Hermanos, Wheelhouse.
Short commute to Manhattan; easy access to the rest of Brooklyn's hottest neighborhoods. Only blocks from the L train, and a short walk to the J, M trains.

amenities.other: Hardwood Floors

details.description:
BRAND NEW LUXURY BUILDING nestled in the vibrant Greenpoint neighborhood!!
APARTMENT FEATURES: Gleaming Hardwood Floors Stainless Steel Kitchen Appliances Central Air Conditioning; Heating Inquire about the availability of Private Balconies
BUILDING AMENITIES: Rooftop Deck with Stunning Views Elevator for Convenience On-Site Laundry Rooms State-of-the-Art Fitness Center Recreational Room Comfortable Tenant Lounge Package Room for Deliveries Bike Storage Parking available($300 monthly) Pet-Friendly Environment First; Security - NO BROKER FEE.
Conveniently located near L train at Lorimer and right next to McCarren Park.

amenities.other: Central A/C, Hardwood Floors

details.description:
BRAND NEW LUXURY BUILDING nestled in the vibrant Greenpoint neighborhood!!
APARTMENT FEATURES: Gleaming Hardwood Floors Stainless Steel Kitchen Appliances Central Air Conditioning; Heating Inquire about the availability of Private Balconies
BUILDING AMENITIES: Rooftop Deck with Stunning Views Elevator for Convenience On-Site Laundry Rooms State-of-the-Art Fitness Center Recreational Room Comfortable Tenant Lounge Package Room for Deliveries Bike Storage Parking available($300 monthly) Pet-Friendly Environment First; Security - NO BROKER FEE.
Conveniently located near L train at Lorimer and right next to McCarren Park.

amenities.other: Central A/C, Hardwood Floors, Balcony/Terrace

details.description:
NOW WITH NO BROKER FEE!!
The Kent House is in arguably THE MOST desirable neighborhood in Brooklyn. Right on the Williamsburg Waterfront with gorgeous river and city views, all the restaurants, coffee shops, bars, art and music venues, plant shops, parks, farmers markets, grocers, and absolutely anything and everything else you could desire right outside your door.
Conveniently located off the J. M, and L trains, as well as the B32, B62, and Q59 bus routes.
UNIT FEATURES: Hardwood Floors Stainless Steel Kitchen Dishwasher Central A/C and Heat Private Balcony Excellent light from extra large windows
BUILDING FEATURES: Bike Room Courtyard Elevator Fitness Center Laundry Room Tenant Lounge Package Room Finished Roof Deck

amenities.other: Balcony/Terrace, Central A/C, Dishwasher, Hardwood Floors, Private Outdoor Space, Private Roof Deck, Roof Access, Shared Outdoor Space

details.description:
BRAND NEW LUXURY BUILDING in the beautiful Vinegar Hill area of DUMBO!! Enjoy unbelievable views across both the Manhattan Bridge and Brooklyn Bridge. Visit the countless parks nearby such as John St Park, Main St Park, Trinity Park, Brooklyn Bridge Park, Cadman Plaza Park, Whitman Park and even more! Become a patron of some of the long standing and delicious LOCAL local restaurants such as Bridge Coffee and still enjoy those late night cravings spots we pretend we don't know and love (*cough Shake Shack) just a few blocks further. Take a little old school Brooklyn, mix in some new luxury living, and that's how you'll end up falling in love with your new home here!
Conveniently located off the A, C and F trains as well as the B57, B62, B69 bus routes.
UNIT FEATURES: Hardwood Floors Stainless Steel Kitchen Dishwasher; Microwave Central A/C; Heat Inquire for Private Balconies! Inquire for IN UNIT laundry!
BUILDING FEATURES: Courtyard Roof Deck Elevator Laundry Room Fitness Center Rec Room Tenant Lounge Package Room Bike Storage Pets Allowed
First; Security NO BROKER FEE!

amenities.other: Central A/C, Dishwasher, Hardwood Floors, Roof Access, Shared Outdoor Space, Washer/Dryer In Unit

details.description:
Prime Crown Heights Living at 1499 Bedford Ave!
Discover the epitome of modern living at 1499 Bedford Ave, a new building in the heart of Crown Heights. Located steps from Eastern Parkway and multiple subway lines, and within walking distance of Grand Army Plaza, Brooklyn Botanical Gardens, and Prospect Park, this residence offers unparalleled convenience and vibrant city life.
Building Amenities:
State-of-the-art fitness room Pet wash station Laundry facilities (in-unit laundry in some units) Social lounge with game room Furnished rooftop with panoramic city views Second-floor public terrace Open workstations Dedicated mail room
Unit Features: Private terraces and balconies in select units Kitchen islands in select units Large windows with abundant natural light Stunning views of NYC skyline, Prospect Park, and neighborhood streets
Welcome to 1499 Bedford Ave?where luxury, community, and convenience meet. Experience the best of Crown Heights living.

amenities.other: Balcony/Terrace

details.description:
? One Fifty Lawrence ? Elevated Living in the Heart of Downtown Brooklyn
Welcome to One Fifty Lawrence, a modern 25-story tower redefining Brooklyn living. Nestled between Fulton and Willoughby Streets, this striking new residence blends refined design, thoughtful amenities, and unbeatable convenience ? just steps from the Jay St?MetroTech subway hub.
Inside, discover bright studio, one-, and two-bedroom apartments with expansive windows, high ceilings, and sleek finishes. Each home is crafted for comfort and style, featuring top-of-the-line appliances, in-unit laundry, and energy-efficient systems.
Residents enjoy access to an impressive amenity collection: a state-of-the-art fitness center, rooftop terrace with sweeping skyline views, resident lounge, and co-working spaces ? all within a pet-friendly community.
At One Fifty Lawrence, you?re surrounded by everything Downtown Brooklyn offers ? premier shopping, dining, and cultural destinations ? while being minutes from Manhattan and the rest of the borough.
Modern design. Urban energy. Unmatched convenience. This is One Fifty Lawrence.

amenities.other: Dishwasher, Hardwood Floors, Stainless steel appliances, Washer/Dryer In Unit, Central A/C

details.description:
The Westmark is a new three-tower development that brings something genuinely different to Brooklyn: signature arched architecture, a landscaped connecting courtyard shared by all residents, and a location that puts Carroll Gardens dining, Whole Foods, and Prospect Park within easy reach. Studios, one-bedrooms, and two-bedrooms are available now ? many with private balconies, terraces, or wraparound terraces with open city views.
Inside your home Floor-to-ceiling windows flood every residence with natural light. Finishes are high-end throughout: custom Italian cabinetry, stone countertops, premium stainless appliances, wide-plank oak flooring, integrated Bluetooth speakers with per-room volume control, and in-unit washer/dryer. Bathrooms are spa-finished with custom vanities and designer tile.
Amenities - 24/7 concierge lobby ? Grand entrance, package handling, secure bike storage - Rooftop + sky lounge ? Sweeping skyline views, cabana seating, outdoor lounge - Fitness + yoga studio ? Full fitness center with dedicated yoga space - Work + social spaces ? Co-working lounge, library, game lounge, movie room - Resident lounge ? Expansive lounge + kids playroom
*Apartment images shown may not represent the actual unit and or view of the apartment listed. Please inquire for more information.

amenities.other: Dishwasher, Hardwood Floors, Central A/C
